next_steps: Immediate cessation or tapering of pulmonary vasodilators due to risk of pulmonary edema
Urgent multidisciplinary evaluation for lung transplantation
Transition to inotropic support (e.g., dobutamine or milrinone) to manage right ventricular failure
Endobronchial ultrasound-guided transbronchial needle aspiration (EBUS-TBNA) of mediastinal lymph nodes to rule out sarcoidosis
Stabilization of hemodynamic status with careful fluid management and continued steroid therapy
